title: Polystichum × uliginosum
taxonomy: Polystichum × uliginosum is a hybrid species within the genus Polystichum, which is part of the family Dryopteridaceae. This classification places it within the class Polypodiopsida and the division Pteridophyta. The Polystichum genus is often referred to as the shield ferns due to their distinctive shield-shaped fronds. The hybrid status of Polystichum × uliginosum indicates that it is a cross between two different species within the Polystichum genus. As a result, the classification of Polystichum × uliginosum may vary depending on the source and the specific parent species involved.
